description: Consolidated quiz bank aggregating the quiz questions embedded in each subject file under ds002_academic/. Organized by difficulty for quick retrieval when a student asks COSIB to 'generate a quiz' on a topic or difficulty level.

easy.question: Which of these is a dynamically-typed language?
What does HTTPS add on top of HTTP?
When is 'A AND B' true?
options: Only when both A and B are true
easy.answer: Only when both A and B are true

easy.question: A user can be authenticated but still not authorized to perform a specific action.

medium.question: What is the time complexity of binary search on a sorted array?
What does 1NF require?
options: Atomic column values and unique rows
A foreign key on every table
medium.answer: Atomic column values and unique rows

medium.question: How many bits does an IPv4 address use?
What do threads in the same process share?
Which is reversible with the right key?
Which model delivers working increments in short, repeated cycles?

hard.question: Which is NOT one of the four necessary conditions for deadlock?
What structure does the OS use to map virtual addresses to physical addresses?
What's the main tradeoff of adding an index?
What algorithm adjusts a neural network's weights during training?
